provider: HKU School of Computing and Data Science BSc(ActuarSc) Programme Requirements
note: The official Programme Requirements apply to the 2025 Year 1 intake and specify a 240-credit degree with 132 credits of disciplinary requirements: 42 Year I core credits, 42 Year II core credits, 30 Year III core credits, at least 12 Year IV disciplinary elective credits and at least 6 Capstone credits. This supplement records all 30 unique explicitly listed course codes. University Requirements, Common Core courses, free electives and courses for an additional major or minor remain open pools and are not fabricated as closed lists. Students normally complete eight full-time academic semesters, with an optional full-time internship of six months or longer extending beyond those semesters.

supplements.programmeName: Bachelor of Science in Actuarial Science
supplements.majorName: Bachelor of Science in Actuarial Science
supplements.ruleSummary: 132 disciplinary credits: 42 credits of Year I core, 42 credits of Year II core, 30 credits of Year III core, at least 12 credits from the Year IV disciplinary elective pool, and at least 6 credits from the Capstone pool.
supplements.evidenceGap: University Requirements, Common Core courses, free electives and any additional major or minor are open choices outside this closed disciplinary-course supplement. The Programme Requirements assign courses by curriculum year but do not prescribe a normative semester.
